global.description: The ad features a bold logo and a prominent discount message against a vibrant red background.
global.main_message: Promoting a sale with significant discounts on bestsellers.

elements.label: ZenDrop logo
elements.description: A bold, modern logo featuring the word 'ZenDrop' in large, white letters against a red background.

elements.label: Discount headline
elements.description: A prominent text element stating 'Up to 40% off' in white font, set against a contrasting background.

elements.label: Shop bestsellers text
elements.description: A smaller text element that reads 'Shop bestsellers now' in a clean, readable font.

elements.label: $4.99 price tag
elements.description: A clear, bold price tag displaying '$4.99' in a prominent font, likely in white or light color.

elements.label: Order now button
elements.description: A bright, eye-catching button with the text 'Order now' in a bold font, designed to attract clicks.

elements.label: Background pattern
elements.description: A subtle decorative element that adds texture or depth to the background, enhancing the overall design.

elements.label: Unidentified element
elements.description: An element that does not have a clear visual identity or role in the ad.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: A solid red background that provides a vibrant canvas for the text and elements.
elements.text_content: Up to 40% off Shop bestsellers now $4.99 Order now

elements.description: An element that does not have a clear visual identity or role in the ad.
